home.heroBadge: Specialized in international school and study-abroad curricula
home.heroTitle: The fastest way to find verified tutors
home.heroDescription: 쌤체크 only lists tutors who pass credential verification based on academics, scores, and teaching records. Compare with confidence and connect right away.

steps.searchDescription: Filter tutors by subject, curriculum, and class format in seconds.
steps.verifyDescription: Review badge status and verification details to shortlist trusted profiles.
steps.connectDescription: Message tutors directly to align schedules and learning goals quickly.

home.trustTitle: What does the verified badge mean?
home.trustDescription: The badge means submitted documents passed admin review. Academic background, scores, and experience are checked to improve trust and safety.
home.subjectsDescription: Pick a subject and jump to matching tutors.
home.finalCtaTitle: Meet the right tutor for your goals today
home.finalCtaDescription: Start your first lesson with confidence on 쌤체크, where verified profiles come first.

privacy.section1Body: 쌤체크 collects and uses personal information to identify members, verify tutors, operate services, and respond to customer inquiries. We do not use data beyond these purposes.
privacy.section2Item1: Common: name, email, profile image, and social login provider details
privacy.section2Item2: Tutor verification: academic/score/experience documents and review notes
privacy.section2Item3: Service usage: access logs, device/browser info, and message activity history
privacy.section2Body: 쌤체크 does not collect resident registration numbers.
privacy.section3Item1: Member information: deleted within 30 days after account withdrawal
privacy.section3Item2: Verification documents: deleted within 90 days after verification purpose is fulfilled or account withdrawal
privacy.section3Item3: If legal retention is required, data is stored separately for the required period
privacy.section4Item1: Supabase: file storage and data processing
privacy.section4Item3: Naver, Kakao, Google: social login authentication
privacy.section5Body: Users may request access, correction, deletion, or suspension of processing of personal information at any time, and 쌤체크 handles requests promptly under applicable laws.

terms.section1Body: 쌤체크 is a tutor matching platform for international curriculum learning. It helps users discover and contact trustworthy tutors using verified profile information.
terms.section2Item1: Users must not impersonate others or submit false information.
terms.section2Item2: Users must comply with applicable laws and these terms, and must not interfere with service operation.
terms.section2Item3: Spam, abusive language, and illegal content via direct messages are prohibited.
terms.section3Body: Tutors must submit supporting documents for academics, scores, and experience. Admins review submissions and assign verification status. Status is provided to improve platform trust.
terms.section4Body: Approved credentials cannot be edited directly by users. If changes are needed, contact admin at help@samcheck.kr.
terms.section5Body: For safety and dispute handling, admins may have read access to user-to-user messages on the platform.
terms.section6Body: 쌤체크 acts as an intermediary platform and is not directly responsible for lesson contracts, outcomes, or disputes between users. Liability may be limited as permitted by law.
